privileged_info_summary: The task.json contains no metadata claims to verify. The dataset 'Viagra.csv' is a famous synthetic teaching dataset originally created by Andy Field (2013). Running a One-Way ANOVA with 'libido' as the Dependent Variable and 'dose' as the Grouping Variable (assuming equal variances) yields an F-statistic of 2.416 with a p-value of 0.108. Descriptive statistics show group means of 3.22 for Placebo (dose=1), 4.88 for Low dose (dose=2), and 4.85 for High dose (dose=3). Tukey post-hoc comparisons show no significant differences between any of the groups (all p-values > 0.05).
